query:
-- 刪除 role='user' 且 email 不在指定清單內的帳號
DELETE FROM users 
WHERE role = 'user' 
AND email NOT IN (
  'support@care580.org',
  'garden.vc.tw@gmail.com',
  'yu.hr523@gmail.com',
  'jacob.wang0419@gmail.com',
  'bookesther1@gmail.com'
);
